a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: Which countries have banned fur farming? 2024
Countries that have banned fur farming at a national level.

g.text: Phased out due to stricter regulations

text.tspan: Note: Partially banned means that there are only sub-national bans or that only certain species are banned. Some countries do not have
bans but introduced stricter regulations that led to the phase-out of farms, as they were no longer profitable.
